title: Rectifier Nonlinearities Improve Neural Network Acoustic Models
mla: Maas, Andrew L., Awni Y. Hannun, and Andrew Y. Ng. "Rectifier Nonlinearities Improve Neural Network Acoustic Models." ICML Workshop on Deep Learning for Audio, Speech, and Language Processing, 2013, https://ai.stanford.edu/~amaas/papers/relu_hybrid_icml2013_final.pdf.
